task_completion.description: Open the baseline model and add a new WingGeom component named 'Aft_Wing'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP window shows a new Wing component added to the geometry browser (Geom Browser), and it is renamed to 'Aft_Wing'.

task_completion.description: Position the 'Aft_Wing' at X=14.0 and Z=2.5 using the XForm tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Geometry dialog for 'Aft_Wing', the 'XForm' tab is selected with the 'X Location' set to 14.0 and 'Z Location' set to 2.5.

task_completion.description: Set the Span to 18.0, Root Chord to 1.5, and Tip Chord to 0.5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Geometry dialog for 'Aft_Wing' (under the 'Plan' or 'Section' tab), the Span value is 18.0, Root Chord is 1.5, and Tip Chord is 0.5.

task_completion.description: Apply a leading-edge Sweep of -28.0 degrees and a Dihedral of -12.0 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Geometry dialog for 'Aft_Wing' (under the 'Plan' tab), the Sweep value is set to -28.0 and the Dihedral value is set to -12.0.

task_completion.description: Open the Vehicle Reference dialog, uncheck 'Extract from Wing', and set the Area to 54.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vehicle Reference' dialog is open, the 'Extract from Wing' checkbox is unchecked, and the 'Area' field is manually set to 54.0.
A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'box_wing_complete.vsp3' in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory, or the main OpenVSP window title bar displays 'box_wing_complete.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenVSP graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP application open with its dialogs (Geometry, Vehicle Reference) being actively manipulated, rather than editing the .vsp3 XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The 3D view in OpenVSP reflects the addition of the joined aft wing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D workspace shows a box wing/joined wing configuration (a forward wing and a swept-forward aft wing connecting to it), confirming the parameters were actually applied to the 3D model.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply use terminal commands to copy a pre-existing solution file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands like 'cp <source> box_wing_complete.vsp3' or downloading a pre-made solution file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file path: /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/box_wing_complete.vsp3. Expected Aft_Wing parameters: X Location = 14.0, Z Location = 2.5, Sweep = -28.0 degrees, Dihedral = -12.0 degrees. Expected global Vehicle Reference Area: 54.0 m^2.
